good.hero_headline: Bright Studio Steps from Rossio Square, Lisbon
highlights: Studio layout for two guests — compact and well designed
Heart of Lisbon, steps from Rossio square and tram stops
Air conditioning, Wi-Fi, and a kitchenette

good.about_this_place: Sunny Central Studio puts you in the middle of Lisbon's historic centre — moments from Rossio square, vintage trams, and some of the city's best tascas. This bright, well-laid-out studio apartment comfortably fits two guests, with a kitchenette, a double sofa bed, and air conditioning. A damage deposit of €150 is pre-authorised and refunded within 7 days of checkout. Check-in from 3 PM, check-out 11 AM.

bad.human_notes: Calls it a 'one-bedroom apartment' when bedrooms=0. This is a studio. Clear structural misrepresentation.
intentional_failures: Describes as 'one-bedroom apartment' — data has bedrooms=0, this is a studio
bad.hero_headline: Charming One-Bedroom Apartment in Central Lisbon
highlights: Private bedroom and living area — ideal for couples
Steps from Rossio square and Lisbon's tram network
Air conditioning and high-speed Wi-Fi throughout
Free cancellation available — book with confidence
bad.about_this_place: This charming one-bedroom apartment occupies a prime spot in the heart of Lisbon, just steps from Rossio square and the city's iconic yellow trams. The separate bedroom provides privacy and comfort for couples, while the open-plan living and kitchen area gives you space to relax after a day exploring the city. With air conditioning, fast Wi-Fi, and a fully equipped kitchen, everything you need is already here.
